title: Section 56
content: The 1[State Government of any State] may, by notification in the Official Gazette, direct that the provisions of this Chapter shall not apply to 2[that State] or to any part thereof specified in the notification.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "G. G. in C.". 2. Subs., ibid., for "any province".
